impact: ~113 arg-bearing onclick handlers across the app templates carry Jinja-interpolated args (e.g. onclick="loadFitting({{ f.id }}, this)"). Migrating them requires a new dispatcher convention. Two designs to consider: (a) `data-click="fn" data-arg="..."` with the handler reading `this.dataset.arg` (1 arg only), (b) `data-click="fn" data-args='[1,2,3]'` JSON-blob convention (any arg shape, but verbose). Recommend (a) for the 80%+ single-arg case and inline data-* attrs for the rest. After contract is defined, the 7 stopProp+arg sites (fitting_saved.html, partials/fitting_search_results.html, partials/mining_ledger_corp.html) can also migrate via `data-click data-arg data-stop`.
title: CSP T-031 follow-up: define data-click-arg dispatcher contract
